headline: Will C.H. Robinson’s New Fuel Card Perks Reshape Its Margin Story and AI Edge (CHRW)?
summary: In early April 2026, C.H. Robinson Worldwide eased cost pressures for its network of contract carriers by launching the C.H. Robinson Fuel Card with waived application fees and free fuel cash advance fees through May, offering discounted diesel at thousands of U.S. truck stops and faster access to up to 60% of load pay. By temporarily absorbing these financing and access-to-fuel costs, C.H. Robinson is using its scale and technology platform to strengthen carrier loyalty and operational...
